translationText: By the fig and the olive.

arabicText: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ فِىٓ أَحْسَنِ تَقْوِيمٍۢ
translationText: We created man in the best design.
Then reduced him to the lowest of the low.

arabicText: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ فَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍۢ
translationText: Except those who believe and do righteous deeds; for them is a reward without end.
So why do you still reject the religion?
Is God not the Wisest of the wise?
